551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Understand what I say to you, O Abu Dharr — a small goat granted to a Muslim man is better for him than a mountain of gold that he leaves behind. Understand what I say to you, O Abu Dharr — the most wealthy will be the lowest on the Day of Resurrection, except those who give generously in every direction. Understand what I say to you — goodness lies in the forelocks of horses until the Day of Resurrection."
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Pahamilah apa yang aku katakan kepadamu, wahai Abu Dharr — seekor kambing kecil yang diberikan kepada seorang Muslim lebih baik baginya daripada gunung emas yang ia tinggalkan. Pahamilah apa yang aku katakan kepadamu, wahai Abu Dharr — orang yang paling kaya akan menjadi yang terendah pada Hari Kiamat, kecuali mereka yang memberi dengan dermawan ke segala arah. Pahamilah apa yang aku katakan — kebaikan ada di ubun-ubun kuda hingga Hari Kiamat."

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "No man accuses another of immorality or disbelief, except that it comes back on him if his companion is not as described."
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang laki-laki yang menuduh orang lain kefasikan atau kekufuran, kecuali tuduhan itu kembali kepadanya jika temannya tidak seperti yang dituduhkan."

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Any man who pulls back a curtain and peers into a house without being given permission has violated a boundary he should not cross. If a man were to gouge out his eye, it would be gone without compensation. And if a man walks through a door without a curtain and permission and someone gouges out his eye, he has no recourse."
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Setiap laki-laki yang menyingkap tirai dan mengintip ke dalam rumah tanpa diberi izin telah melanggar batas yang tidak boleh ia langgar. Jika seseorang mencungkil matanya, itu hilang tanpa ganti rugi. Dan jika seseorang berjalan melalui pintu tanpa tirai dan izin lalu seseorang mencungkil matanya, ia tidak punya tuntutan."

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله commanded him with six things: do not take on responsibility for the wealth of an orphan, do not be a judge between two people, do not appoint yourself over two people, and do not take in someone who has fled from a ruler.
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memerintahkannya dengan enam hal: jangan mengambil tanggung jawab atas harta anak yatim, jangan menjadi hakim antara dua orang, jangan mengangkat dirimu sebagai pemimpin atas dua orang, dan jangan menyembunyikan seseorang yang melarikan diri dari penguasa.

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu al-Aswad al-Dili said: "I observed the Companions of the Prophet دلوالله and I did not see anyone like Abu Dharr." This is the last hadith of Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him).
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Abu al-Aswad al-Dili berkata: "Aku mengamati para Sahabat Nabi دلوالله dan tidak melihat seorang pun seperti Abu Dharr." Ini adalah hadits terakhir Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu).

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he took some game at al-Aswaf but Zaid ibn Thabit took it from him and released it, saying: "Do you not know that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله declared the area between its two black stony tracts inviolable?"
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia mengambil hewan buruan di al-Aswaf namun Zaid ibn Thabit mengambilnya darinya dan melepaskannya, seraya berkata: "Tidakkah kamu tahu bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله menyatakan daerah di antara dua tanah berbatu hitamnya sebagai tanah haram?"

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله gave a concession for the sale of araya dates — that they be sold for their estimated weight.
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله memberikan keringanan untuk penjualan kurma araya — bahwa kurma tersebut dijual sesuai perkiraan timbangannya.

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "I am leaving among you two successors: the Book of Allah — a rope stretched between the sky and earth — and my family, the people of my household. These two shall not separate until they meet me at the Pond."
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Aku meninggalkan di antara kalian dua pengganti: Kitab Allah — tali yang membentang antara langit dan bumi — dan keluargaku, ahlul baitku. Keduanya tidak akan berpisah hingga menemui aku di Telaga."

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he visited Mu'awiyah and mentioned a hadith. Mu'awiyah ordered someone to write it down, but Zaid said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله forbade us from writing anything of his hadith." So it was erased.
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia mengunjungi Mu'awiyah dan menyebutkan sebuah hadits. Mu'awiyah memerintahkan seseorang untuk menuliskannya, tetapi Zaid berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله melarang kami menuliskan apa pun dari haditsnya." Maka tulisan itu dihapus.

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that some people debated about reciting in Zuhr and Asr prayers. They sent to Kharijah ibn Zaid who said: "My father said: The Messenger of Allah دلوالله used to prolong the standing and move his lips — and knowing this, I know it was only for recitation, so I do likewise."
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa beberapa orang berdebat tentang membaca di shalat Zuhur dan Ashar. Mereka mengutus kepada Kharijah ibn Zaid yang berkata: "Ayahku berkata: Rasulullah دلوالله biasa memperpanjang berdiri dan menggerakkan bibirnya — dan mengetahui hal ini, aku tahu itu hanya untuk membaca, jadi aku melakukan hal yang sama."

561.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله gave a concession for the sale of araya dates — that they be sold at their estimated weight.
561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله memberikan keringanan untuk penjualan kurma araya — bahwa kurma tersebut dijual sesuai perkiraan timbangannya.

562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله prayed some nights and people gathered to him. Then they lost the sound of his voice and thought he had gone to sleep, so some began clearing their throats to bring him out to them. He said: "You kept doing what you were doing until I feared it would be written as obligatory for you. And if it were written as obligatory for you, you could not have maintained it."
562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله shalat beberapa malam dan orang-orang berkumpul kepadanya. Kemudian mereka kehilangan suaranya dan mengira beliau telah tidur, maka sebagian mulai berdehem untuk membuatnya keluar kepada mereka. Beliau bersabda: "Kalian terus melakukan apa yang kalian lakukan hingga aku khawatir itu akan ditulis sebagai kewajiban bagi kalian. Dan jika itu ditulis sebagai kewajiban bagi kalian, kalian tidak akan mampu mempertahankannya."

563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله gave a concession for the sale of araya dates at their estimated quantity.
563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله memberikan keringanan untuk penjualan kurma araya dengan perkiraan jumlahnya.

564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله forbade selling fruit on trees for dried fruit (muzabana), then Zaid ibn Thabit informed them that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله gave a concession for araya.
564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله melarang menjual buah di pohon dengan kurma kering (muzabanah), kemudian Zaid ibn Thabit memberitahu mereka bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله memberikan keringanan untuk araya.

565.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he took the pre-dawn meal with the Prophet دلوالله, then they went out to the mosque and the prayer was established. He was asked: "How much time was between them?" He said: "The time it takes a man to recite fifty verses."
565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia sahur bersama Nabi دلوالله, kemudian mereka pergi ke masjid dan shalat didirikan. Ia ditanya: "Berapa lama antara keduanya?" Ia berkata: "Waktu yang dibutuhkan seseorang untuk membaca lima puluh ayat."

566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله ruled that a "life gift" (umra) belongs to the inheritor. Or he said: he judged by the umra ruling.
566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memutuskan bahwa "hadiah seumur hidup" (umra) menjadi milik ahli waris. Atau beliau bersabda: beliau menghakimi dengan hukum umra.

567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله asked him: "Do you know Syriac? Letters come to me in it." He said: "No." He said: "Then learn it." So he learned it in seventeen days.
567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bertanya kepadanya: "Apakah kamu mengetahui bahasa Suryani? Surat-surat datang kepadaku dalam bahasa itu." Ia berkata: "Tidak." Beliau bersabda: "Maka pelajarilah." Maka ia mempelajarinya dalam tujuh belas hari.

568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding renting farmland: two men had fought and the Prophet دلوالله said: "If this is your situation, then do not rent out farmland." Rafi' heard the words "do not rent out farmland" without knowing the context.
568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) mengenai menyewakan lahan pertanian: dua orang telah bertengkar dan Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Jika ini situasimu, maka janganlah menyewakan lahan pertanian." Rafi' mendengar kata-kata "jangan menyewakan lahan pertanian" tanpa mengetahui konteksnya.

569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said something fell into his mind about divine decree, so he asked Zaid about it. Zaid said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'Even if you spent a mountain of Uhud in gold in the way of Allah, Allah would not accept it until you believe in divine decree, and know that what befell you could not have missed you, and what missed you could not have befallen you. And if you die upon other than this, you will enter the Fire.'"
569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata ada sesuatu yang jatuh dalam benaknya tentang takdir, maka ia bertanya kepada Zaid tentangnya. Zaid berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Bahkan jika kamu menginfakkan gunung Uhud berupa emas di jalan Allah, Allah tidak akan menerimanya hingga kamu beriman kepada takdir, dan mengetahui bahwa apa yang menimpamu tidak mungkin melewatimu, dan apa yang melewatimu tidak mungkin menimpamu. Dan jika kamu meninggal dalam keadaan selain ini, kamu akan masuk Neraka.'"

570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "May Allah make radiant the face of a man who hears a hadith from us and memorizes it until he conveys it to others — for many a carrier of understanding is not himself a scholar, and many a carrier of understanding carries it to one who is more of a scholar than him. Three qualities: the heart of a Muslim shall never harbor rancor toward them — sincerity of action for Allah, giving good counsel to those in authority, and adhering to the Muslim community."
570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Semoga Allah membuat cerah wajah seseorang yang mendengar hadits dari kami dan menghafalnya hingga ia menyampaikannya kepada orang lain — karena banyak pembawa pemahaman yang bukan seorang ulama, dan banyak pembawa pemahaman yang membawanya kepada seseorang yang lebih berilmu darinya. Tiga sifat: hati seorang Muslim tidak akan pernah menyimpan dendam terhadap mereka — keikhlasan amal karena Allah, memberikan nasihat yang tulus kepada pemimpin, dan berpegang teguh pada jemaah Muslim."

571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he recited Surah al-Najm to the Prophet دلوالله and he did not perform prostration.
571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia membacakan Surah al-Najm kepada Nabi دلوالله dan beliau tidak melakukan sujud.

572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) via Ibn Abbas that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله performed the prayer of fear at Dhi Qarad, land of the Banu Sulaym, arranging the people in two rows behind him — one row facing the enemy and one row directly behind him. He prayed one rak'ah with those nearest to him, then they retreated to the position of the others.
572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) via Ibnu Abbas bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله melakukan shalat khauf di Dhi Qarad, tanah Bani Sulaim, mengatur orang-orang dalam dua barisan di belakangnya — satu barisan menghadap musuh dan satu barisan tepat di belakangnya. Beliau shalat satu rakaat bersama mereka yang terdekat dengannya, kemudian mereka mundur ke posisi yang lain.

573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله was in an enclosure and used to go out to pray in it. Then people began to join him and it became crowded. He said: "The best prayer of a person is in his home, except for the obligatory prayer."
573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله berada di sebuah bilik dan biasa keluar untuk shalat di dalamnya. Kemudian orang-orang mulai bergabung dengannya dan menjadi padat. Beliau bersabda: "Shalat terbaik seseorang adalah di rumahnya, kecuali shalat wajib."

574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Asr prayer was one of the hardest on the Companions of the Prophet دلوالله. Then the verse was revealed: "Guard strictly the prayers, especially the middle prayer" [Quran 2:238]. He said: "Before it are two prayers and after it are two prayers."
574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa shalat Ashar adalah yang paling berat bagi para Sahabat Nabi دلوالله. Kemudian turunlah ayat: "Jagalah shalat-shalat kalian, terutama shalat wustha" [QS. 2:238]. Beliau bersabda: "Sebelumnya ada dua shalat dan setelahnya ada dua shalat."

575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that Umar said that a verse was revealed: "The old man and old woman, if they commit adultery, stone them definitively." When this was revealed, Umar came to the Messenger of Allah دلوالله and asked him to write it down. Umar also noted that an unmarried person guilty of fornication is flogged, while a married person guilty of fornication is stoned.
575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Umar berkata bahwa sebuah ayat diturunkan: "Orang tua laki-laki dan orang tua perempuan, jika mereka berzina, rajamlah mereka dengan pasti." Ketika ini diturunkan, Umar datang kepada Rasulullah دلوالله dan memintanya untuk menuliskannya. Umar juga mencatat bahwa orang yang belum menikah yang bersalah dalam perzinahan didera, sementara orang yang sudah menikah yang bersalah dalam perzinahan dirajam.

576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that a wolf mauled a sheep and they slaughtered it with a sharp stone. The Prophet دلوالله gave permission to eat it.
576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seekor serigala menyerang seekor kambing dan mereka menyembelihnya dengan batu tajam. Nabi دلوالله memberikan izin untuk memakannya.

577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Perform ablution from that which the fire has touched."
577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Berwudhulah dari apa yang telah disentuh api."

578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Companions of the Prophet دلوالله were divided into two groups regarding the hypocrites — one saying to kill them and another saying not to. Allah revealed: "What is the matter with you that you are divided into two groups concerning the hypocrites?" [Quran 4:88]. The Messenger of Allah دلوالله then said: "Madinah is pure and it repels evil as fire repels the impurities of silver."
578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa para Sahabat Nabi دلوالله terbagi menjadi dua kelompok tentang kaum munafik — satu kelompok berkata untuk membunuh mereka dan kelompok lain berkata tidak. Allah menurunkan: "Ada apa dengan kalian sehingga kalian terbagi menjadi dua kelompok tentang kaum munafik?" [QS. 4:88]. Rasulullah دلوالله kemudian bersabda: "Madinah suci dan menolak kejahatan sebagaimana api menolak kotoran perak."

579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that one of the Ansar had a dream in which he was asked: "Shall we make for you a dhikr after every prayer?" He said in his dream: "Yes." He said: "Then make it twenty-five times each and include tahlil in it." When morning came, he went to the Prophet دلوالله who said: "Do so."
579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa salah seorang Anshar bermimpi ditanya: "Apakah kami akan menetapkan dzikir bagimu setelah setiap shalat?" Ia berkata dalam mimpinya: "Ya." Ia berkata: "Maka jadikanlah dua puluh lima kali masing-masing dan sertakan tahlil di dalamnya." Ketika pagi datang, ia pergi kepada Nabi دلوالله yang bersabda: "Lakukan hal itu."

580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله placed his leg on his thigh until he feared it would crush it. Then the verse was revealed: "Those of the believers who sit behind are not equal to those who strive in the way of Allah" [Quran 4:95].
580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله meletakkan kakinya di pahanya hingga ia khawatir akan menghancurkannya. Kemudian turunlah ayat: "Orang-orang yang beriman yang duduk di belakang tidaklah sama dengan orang-orang yang berjuang di jalan Allah" [QS. 4:95].

581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله prayed on the second night and they could no longer hear his voice. When they cleared their throats, he looked out to them and said: "You kept doing what you were doing until I feared it would be written as obligatory for you. And if it were written as obligatory for you, you would not have been able to maintain it."
581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله shalat pada malam kedua dan mereka tidak lagi bisa mendengar suaranya. Ketika mereka berdehem, beliau menengok kepada mereka dan bersabda: "Kalian terus melakukan apa yang kalian lakukan hingga aku khawatir itu akan ditulis sebagai kewajiban bagi kalian. Dan jika itu ditulis sebagai kewajiban bagi kalian, kalian tidak akan mampu mempertahankannya."

582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "May Allah curse the Jews — they took the graves of their prophets as places of prayer."
582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Semoga Allah mengutuk kaum Yahudi — mereka menjadikan kuburan para nabi mereka sebagai tempat shalat."

583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say on a day: "Blessed is Syria! Blessed is Syria!" He was asked: "Why Syria?" He said: "The angels spread their wings over Syria."
583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda pada suatu hari: "Beruntunglah Syam! Beruntunglah Syam!" Beliau ditanya: "Mengapa Syam?" Beliau bersabda: "Para malaikat membentangkan sayap mereka di atas Syam."

584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that they were compiling the Quran on pieces of parchment when the Prophet دلوالله said: "Blessed is Syria!" He was asked: "Why, O Messenger of Allah?" He said: "Because the angels of the Most Merciful spread their wings over it."
584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa mereka sedang mengompilasi Al-Quran di atas lembaran-lembaran perkamen ketika Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Beruntunglah Syam!" Beliau ditanya: "Mengapa, wahai Rasulullah?" Beliau bersabda: "Karena malaikat-malaikat Yang Maha Pengasih membentangkan sayap mereka di atasnya."

585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله had himself cupped in the mosque.
585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله berbekam di masjid.

586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) — or Abu Ayyub — that he said to Marwan: "Did I not see you shorten the two prostrations of Maghrib? I saw the Prophet دلوالله recite in them from Surah al-A'raf."
586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) — atau Abu Ayyub — bahwa ia berkata kepada Marwan: "Tidakkah aku melihatmu mempersingkat dua sujud shalat Maghrib? Aku melihat Nabi دلوالله membaca di dalamnya dari Surah al-A'raf."

587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله looked toward Yemen and said: "O Allah, turn their hearts." And he looked toward another direction and said: "O Allah, turn their hearts and bless us in our sa' and our mudd."
587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memandang ke arah Yaman dan bersabda: "Ya Allah, palingkan hati mereka." Dan beliau memandang ke arah lain dan bersabda: "Ya Allah, palingkan hati mereka dan berkahilah kami dalam sha' dan mudd kami."

588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that something troubled his mind about divine decree, so he asked Zaid about it. Zaid said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'If Allah were to punish the inhabitants of His heavens and His earth, He would punish them without being unjust to them. And if He were to have mercy on them, His mercy would be better for them than their deeds. And if you had gold equal to Mount Uhud — or a mountain like Uhud in gold — and spent it in the way of Allah, Allah would not accept it until you believe in divine decree.'"
588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa sesuatu mengganggunya tentang takdir, maka ia bertanya kepada Zaid tentangnya. Zaid berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Jika Allah menghukum penghuni langit-langit dan bumi-Nya, Dia akan menghukum mereka tanpa berbuat zalim kepada mereka. Dan jika Dia merahmati mereka, rahmat-Nya akan lebih baik bagi mereka daripada amal-amal mereka. Dan jika kamu memiliki emas sebesar Gunung Uhud — atau gunung seperti Uhud berupa emas — dan menginfakkannya di jalan Allah, Allah tidak akan menerimanya hingga kamu beriman kepada takdir.'"

589.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that Aisha used to pray two rak'ahs after Asr because the Prophet دلوالله had prayed them there. Zaid said: "May Allah forgive Aisha — we know more about the Messenger of Allah دلوالله than Aisha. That was only because some Bedouin people came to him during Zuhr and he was unable to pray those two rak'ahs then, so he prayed them after Asr."
589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Aisyah biasa shalat dua rakaat setelah Ashar karena Nabi دلوالله pernah shalat di sana. Zaid berkata: "Semoga Allah mengampuni Aisyah — kami lebih mengetahui tentang Rasulullah دلوالله daripada Aisyah. Itu hanya karena beberapa orang Badui datang kepadanya saat Zuhur dan beliau tidak sempat shalat dua rakaat itu, maka beliau shalat setelah Ashar."

590.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله forbade muhaqalah and muzabanah (forms of speculative sale involving crops and fruit).
590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله melarang muhaqalah dan muzabanah (bentuk jual beli spekulatif yang melibatkan tanaman dan buah-buahan).

591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Do not sell fruit until its ripeness becomes apparent."
591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Janganlah menjual buah hingga kematangannya tampak jelas."

592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he took the pre-dawn meal with the Prophet دلوالله, then they went out to the mosque and the prayer was established. Zaid was asked how much time passed between the two. He said: "About the time it takes to recite fifty verses."
592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia sahur bersama Nabi دلوالله, kemudian mereka pergi ke masjid dan shalat didirikan. Zaid ditanya berapa lama yang berlalu antara keduanya. Ia berkata: "Sekitar waktu yang dibutuhkan untuk membaca lima puluh ayat."

593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he stood at the Saqifa of Banu Sa'ida and said that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله was from the Emigrants and therefore the leader must be from the Emigrants — and the Ansar are his supporters as they supported the Messenger of Allah دلوالله.
593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berdiri di Saqifah Bani Sa'idah dan berkata bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله berasal dari kaum Muhajirin dan karena itu pemimpin harus berasal dari kaum Muhajirin — dan kaum Anshar adalah pendukungnya sebagaimana mereka mendukung Rasulullah دلوالله.

594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله asked him to learn the script of the Jews, saying: "I do not trust the Jews with my correspondence." Zaid said: "So I learned their script — and in fifteen nights I had mastered it. I used to read their letters to him when they wrote to him and reply on his behalf when he wrote."
594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memintanya mempelajari tulisan orang Yahudi, seraya bersabda: "Aku tidak mempercayai orang Yahudi dengan korespondensi-Ku." Zaid berkata: "Maka aku mempelajari tulisan mereka — dan dalam lima belas malam aku telah menguasainya. Aku biasa membacakan surat-surat mereka kepadanya ketika mereka menulis kepadanya dan membalas atas namanya ketika beliau menulis."

595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he had the pre-dawn meal with the Prophet دلوالله and then went out to the mosque and the prayer was established. He was asked: "How much time was between them?" He said: "About the time to recite fifty verses." He also asked Zaid: "How much was between them?" He said: "About fifty verses."
595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia sahur bersama Nabi دلوالله kemudian pergi ke masjid dan shalat didirikan. Ia ditanya: "Berapa lama antara keduanya?" Ia berkata: "Sekitar waktu untuk membaca lima puluh ayat." Ia juga bertanya kepada Zaid: "Berapa lama antara keduanya?" Ia berkata: "Sekitar lima puluh ayat."

596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he had the pre-dawn meal with the Prophet دلوالله, then went out to the mosque and the prayer was established. He was asked: "How much was between them?" He said: "About the time it takes a man to recite fifty verses."
596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia sahur bersama Nabi دلوالله, kemudian pergi ke masjid dan shalat didirikan. Ia ditanya: "Berapa lama antara keduanya?" Ia berkata: "Sekitar waktu yang dibutuhkan seseorang untuk membaca lima puluh ayat."

597.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about reciting in Zuhr and Asr prayers. He said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله used to prolong the standing and move his lips."
597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang membaca di shalat Zuhur dan Ashar. Ia berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله biasa memperpanjang berdiri dan menggerakkan bibirnya."

598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he recited Surah al-Najm to the Messenger of Allah دلوالله and he did not prostrate in it.
598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia membacakan Surah al-Najm kepada Rasulullah دلوالله dan beliau tidak bersujud di dalamnya.

599.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "The best prayer a person offers is in his home, except for the obligatory prayer."
599.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Shalat terbaik yang dilakukan seseorang adalah di rumahnya, kecuali shalat wajib."

600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zaid ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "May Allah fight the Jews" — or: "May Allah curse the Jews — they took the graves of their prophets as places of worship."
600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zaid ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Semoga Allah memerangi kaum Yahudi" — atau: "Semoga Allah mengutuk kaum Yahudi — mereka menjadikan kuburan para nabi mereka sebagai tempat ibadah."
